ops.body: Shipped as captain-hook 9.10.0 (tag v9.10.0 → 1075b440cb3e; general pack 0.21.0). Feature commit xzpuwwrq (f9506cb8) + review-fix commit xlllmyvr (a1c920a5 after rebase). Verification: full pytest green (3305 collected; one foreign daemon flake test_client_disconnect_still_completes_dispatch deselected, passes 5/5 in isolation); pack inline 463/463 via uvx capt-hook@9.10.0; PyPI resolution confirmed with env -u UV_EXCLUDE_NEWER. Release/CI/Docs/Guides workflows all success (e.g. https://github.com/yasyf/captain-hook/actions/runs/29271352928). A2 review: codex finder+refuter (gpt-5.6-sol xhigh) produced 11 accepted fixes (trailing-comment grouping, shebang, go doc adjacency, doc-prefix poisoning, blank-line-split merge, multiset touched semantics, ambiguous-Edit None, rust EOF newline, density suppression+advisory separator, dispatch skip handler-backed after block, case-insensitive suffix) + 6 documented accepted tradeoffs in the comments.py docstring.
